description_long: This sculpture depicts a highly detailed, anatomically accurate human male figure in a dramatic, dynamic pose. The figure is shown with its head tilted back and mouth open, as if in a moment of intense emotion or exertion. Musculature and skeletal structure are prominently defined, with the right arm bent and raised, and the left arm extended outward. The figure stands on a round base that is mounted on a square plinth, giving it stability and presence. The surface has a matte, bronze-like finish, suggesting it is cast from metal. The overall impression is one of expressive movement and anatomical study.
description: A detailed, anatomically accurate male figure sculpture in a dramatic, expressive pose with a bronze-like finish, mounted on a square plinth.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the figure's chest, raised right arm, and expressive upward tilt of the head.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the muscular back, extended left arm, and the figure's stance on the plinth.
description_view_2: Right side view emphasizing the ribcage, bent right arm, and the backward arch of the torso.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the full chest, abdominal muscles, and the outstretched left arm.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; the sculpture is shown isolated on a white background.
